title: AMETEK's (AME) CEO Dave Zapico on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: AMETEK's (AME) CEO Dave Zapico on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: AMETEK Q4 Results Surpass Street View
text: AMETEK Inc  AME reported fourth-quarter sales growth of 25.4% year-over-year to $1.5 billion, beating the consensus of $1.47 billion. Adjusted EPS improved to $1.37 from $1.08 in 4Q20, beating the consensus of $1.30.

title: Ametek (AME) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Ametek (AME) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.58% and 2.44%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
